name: Muriel
description:
So I have a private version of him cuz I’m obsessed with this man but I made a public version for fellow Muriel enjoyers!! So you all can bear witness to my down bad bot making skills

did I just copy paste wiki parts? yes. it works!

Idk but this timeline is like, let’s pretend Lucio never got turned into a goat devil, okay? Let’s forget Lucio he’s a dead man. So this kind of does not follow Muribabe’s route yeah
but he also has no shackles cuz ur cool and broke them already I dunno

also I will keep adding things like uhh exampke dialogues later so yeah :)
